objective: Design, build, test, and submit a production-ready MCP server wrapping the RARE Protocol CLI for autonomous NFT operations on SuperRare

executionLog.description: Fetched and analyzed rare-cli source from github.com/superrare/rare-cli and rare.xyz/docs
executionLog.result: Confirmed 14 CLI commands available across 6 categories: configure, deploy, import, mint, auction, search
executionLog.decision: Proceed with full MCP wrapper covering all 14 commands

executionLog.description: Designed tool architecture — 14 tools across 5 modules: wallet, deploy, mint, auction, search
executionLog.decision: Use TypeScript + MCP SDK + stdio transport. Modular file structure one domain per file.

executionLog.description: Scaffolded project: npm init, installed @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, zod, typescript
Implemented all 14 MCP tools across 5 TypeScript modules with Zod validation and full tool descriptions
executionLog.result: Build succeeded: tsc compiled 13 files to dist/

executionLog.description: Diagnosed and fixed Windows .cmd binary execution issue (execFile -> exec with shell:cmd.exe). Resolved RARE_CLI_PATH env var pattern for cross-platform compatibility.
executionLog.fix: Switched from execFile to exec with shell:'cmd.exe', injected RARE_CLI_PATH via claude_desktop_config.json env field
executionLog.result: MCP Inspector connected successfully, all 14 tools visible

executionLog.description: End-to-end tool testing via Claude Desktop MCP integration
On-chain write tool testing on Sepolia testnet

onChainTransactions.note: Agent verified no bids before cancelling

executionLog.result: Full deploy -> mint -> auction -> cancel lifecycle confirmed working
executionLog.guardrailDemonstrated: Agent called rare_auction_status before cancel to verify no bids existed

executionLog.description: Pushed to GitHub and registered for Synthesis Hackathon
Project submission published to Synthesis Hackathon judge pool

tracks: Let the Agent Cook - No Humans Required

autonomyDemonstrated: Cross-platform path resolution via env var injection
